sourceTitle: geoBoundaries Syrian Arab Republic Administrative Boundaries

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-subdistricts/geoboundaries-syr-adm3-api.json
rawFiles.notes: geoBoundaries API metadata for Syria ADM3 gbOpen.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-subdistricts/geoboundaries-syr-adm3.geojson
rawFiles.notes: Syria ADM3 boundary GeoJSON downloaded from geoBoundaries.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-subdistricts/hdx-cod-ab-syr-package.json
rawFiles.notes: HDX package metadata for the UN OCHA Syria common operational administrative boundary source referenced by geoBoundaries.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-subdistricts/geoboundaries-syr-adm3-derived-areas-and-matches.json
rawFiles.notes: Local ADM3 parent matches, GeoNames point matches, derived centroids, and derived area values.

transforms: Downloaded geoBoundaries Syria ADM3 API metadata and boundary GeoJSON.
Matched each ADM3 feature to an existing OpenSyria district by placing the derived ADM3 centroid inside ADM2 polygons and resolving the ADM2 geoBoundaries shape ID.
Used geoBoundaries ADM3 shape names as canonical English subdistrict names.
Calculated polygon area from GeoJSON coordinates with a spherical polygon area formula using mean Earth radius 6371008.8 metres.
Rounded derived subdistrict areas to three decimal places in square kilometres.
Stored geoBoundaries shape IDs as external identifiers.
Used derived centroids only for ADM3 shapes without a matching GeoNames ADM3 representative point.
reviewNotes: Seeded 272 current ADM3 subdistrict records from geoBoundaries. Six geoBoundaries ADM3 shapes did not have matching GeoNames ADM3 points during spatial matching: Fiq, Al-Butayhah, Quneitra, Al-Khashniyyeh, Masaada, and Sabe Byar. These records remain source-backed by geoBoundaries and are marked for future name and identifier enrichment.
